classification_notes.missing_coating: Large low-reflection coating loss or missing paint.
classification_notes.irregular_edges_peel_off: Torn coating boundary, peel-off skin, edge damage, and jagged delamination.
classification_notes.air_bubbles: Raised laser-profile peaks and oval swelling regions.
classification_notes.scratches: Narrow line defects and black line-like laser intensity dips.
classification_notes.texture_pits: Distributed roughness, small pitting, pin holes, and local depressions.
